titleStmt.title: SII 26.432: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 432. (A.R. No. 411 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmaruviya tirumādum, etc., and mentions the queen Ulaguḍai Mukkōkkiḻānaḍigaḷ.

It records a gift of 4 vēli of land in Marudūr alias Ābharaṇadāṇinallūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Malaiyamāṉ Attimallaṉ Śokkapperumāḷ alias Rājagambhirachchēdiyarāyan of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, for food-offerings to the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam, in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that various incomes specified relating to the gift land need not be paid and that the gift would be maintained hereditarily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum jeyamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulaka Arumaṟai
viti neṟi taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimai maṇimuṭi cūṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaik kaḷi ṟeṭṭu taṅku tani kū
ṭan=tāneṉ viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkatirāḻi puvi vaḷarntuṭaṉavar vil
lavarriṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pārttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟ piṉ maṇṇakam puṇarntu ce
mpoṉ virasiṁhāsaṉattu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecari panmarā
ṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 9 Āvatu rājarāja- vaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkai
kkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppulippakavadevarkku Innāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭi kiḷiyū
r malaiyamāṉ Attimallaṉ cokkapperumāḷāṉa rājagambhīraccetiyarāyaneṉ It tevaṟku Amutu
paṭi cennel Amutuceytaruḷukaikku nāṉ viṭṭa nilamāvatu Innāṭṭu marutūrāna Āparaṇatāṇi nal
lū ṇam pokivatikku kiḻakku viṭṭa nilam mūnṟarai velikku kiḻpāṟkellai Ittevar tevatāṉa
kūṭṭattukkum pelipaṭṭikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkkellai tūṟṟaṟumāvukkum Ilattai yet
tattukkum Oṭaikkum teṟkil vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvilattai Ēttattu mel
varampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ivvilattaiyettattukkum perettattukku pūṅkettattu
kkum māñceṟuvukkum paṭappaic ceṟuvukku vamutu varampukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta nāṟpere
llaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam patinālarai Aṭik kolāl nilam muṉṟaraiveliyum Ivvatikku meṟku Atta na
ḷam ponnūr Ellaikku kiḻakku koṟṟavāyileṉṟu peruṭaiya taṭi palavināl Ikkolāl nila
m Araiveliyum Āka nilam nālu veliyum cantrādittavaja celvatākaviṭṭeṉ
pperumāḷāṉa rājagambhīrac cetiyarāyaneṉ Innilattukku An=tarāyam perumic cokkap pāṭikāval ciṟu
pāṭikāval Uḷḷiṭṭa Āyaṅkaḷum Āḷum Amañciyum Iṟukka kaṭavatallātatāka Ippaṭi Eṅka
ḷ vaṅśamuḷḷataṉaiyum cellak kaṭavataāka viṭṭeṉ rājagambhīrac cetiyarāyaneṉ Innila
m Aḻivuceyvār vallavaraiyan satyam Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai ¬ ...§
Digital edition of SII 26.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
